zh_subtitle: 从碳水分子结构、消化吸收生理、激素调控、胰岛素抵抗、肝肌协同到餐后反应调节因素（进餐顺序、回生淀粉、醋、活动等），系统讲解血糖稳态机制与实践意义。
en_subtitle: From carbohydrate chemistry and food structure, digestion/absorption physiology, hormonal control, insulin resistance, liver-muscle interplay, to modulators of postprandial responses (food order, resistant starch, vinegar, activity), a systematic treatment of glucose homeostasis mechanisms and practical implications.
zh_search: 血糖 碳水 单糖 双糖 多糖 淀粉 纤维 胰岛素 胰高血糖素 代谢 力量训练 餐后 血糖控制
en_search: glucose carbohydrates monosaccharides disaccharides polysaccharides starch fiber insulin glucagon metabolism strength training postprandial
